# SECURITY*Created: Tuesday, February 20, 2024 at 8:42:48?PM*<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><h1>Business Development Manager</h1></div>
<div>Your application was viewed on 1/29/2024</div>

<div><b><h2><br></h2></b></div>
<div><b><h2>Share</h2></b></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><b><h2><br></h2></b></div>
<div><b><h2>Show more options</h2></b></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>About the job</div>
<div>We are a pioneering cybersecurity company on a mission to redefine Privileged Access Management. Our solutions are built upon the foundation of cutting-edge technology, ensuring the highest level of security and seamless deployment for our clients. We take immense satisfaction in our recognition as a market innovation leader in PAM by Kuppinger Cole, our feature in Gartner's PAM MQ report, and our receipt of numerous esteemed industry awards. With the privilege of serving hundreds of organizations in over 30 countries, we proudly demonstrate our global influence.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>If you're driven by the desire to make a meaningful contribution to the cybersecurity landscape, we invite you to join us in setting new global standards.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Business Development Manager</div>
<div>Location: Newark, CA / hybrid work</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced person to join our growing team. The successful candidate will be responsible for identifying new business opportunities, building long-term relationships with potential and existing clients, and driving revenue growth.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Responsibilities: </div>
<div><br></div>
<ul>
<li>Develop and execute business strategies to achieve sales targets</li>
<li>Own the complete sales cycle from prospecting, to nurture and close</li>
<li>Identify and assessing potential business opportunities and clients</li>
<li>Conduct market research to find new avenues for growth</li>
<li>Build and maintaining strong, long-lasting customer relationships</li>
<li>Attend industry events and conferences</li>
<li>Prepare and delivering presentations, product demos, and proposals to technical and non-technical stakeholders</li>
<li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet clients' needs</li>
<li>Maintain good CRM hygiene to manage pipeline and report sales metrics</li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<div>Qualifications:</div>
<div><br></div>
<ul>
<li>BachelorŐs degree in Business, Marketing or related field</li>
<li>Minimum 3 years of experience in business development / sales</li>
<li>Prior experience selling cyber security, networking, or IT infrastructure is a big plus</li>
<li>Proven track record of achieving revenue targets</li>
<li>Excellent communication and interpersonal skills</li>
<li>Strong negotiation skills</li>
<li>Enthusiasm, motivation, and a self-driven approach, with the ability to collaborate effectively within a team</li>
<li>Experience with value-based sales methodologies</li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<div>Benefits: </div>
<div><br></div>
<ul>
<li>Base Salary: $50,000 - $75,000</li>
<li>On-Target Earnings (OTE): $100,000 - $150,000</li>
<li>Health &amp Dental Insurance</li>
<li>Hybrid work environment</li>
<li>Paid Vacation and Federal Holidays</li>
<li>Cell Phone Expense Reimbursment</li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<div>Application Process:</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Interested candidates should send their resume and a cover letter to hr@fudosecurity.com or apply directly through this platform.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Fudo Security Inc. is an equal-opportunity employer.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div><b><h2><br></h2></b></div>

</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table></object><b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></b></div>

<div>About the company</div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><h2>Fudo Security</h2><b><h2><br></h2></b></div>
<div>3,395 followers</div>
<div><b><h2><br></h2></b></div>
<div><b><h2>Following</h2></b></div>
<div>Computer and Network SecurityĘĘ51-200 employeesĘĘ56 on LinkedIn</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>We are a pioneering cybersecurity company on a mission to redefine Privileged Access Management. Our solutions are built upon the foundation of cutting-edge technology, ensuring the highest level of security and seamless deployment for our clients. We take immense satisfaction in our recognition as a market innovation leader in PAM by Kuppinger Cole, our feature in Gartner's PAM MQ report, and our receipt of numerous esteemed industry awards. With the privilege of serving hundreds of organizations in over 30 countries, we proudly demonstrate our global influence.</div>
<div>É</div>
<div>show more</div>
